name: shape_control_v1_01_release_notes_atlas_relay
description: Release notes from a long Atlas Relay fact block.
system_prompt: You are a structured summarization assistant. Use only the provided facts, keep reasoning light, and satisfy the explicit keyword and minimum-length constraints exactly.

facts.limitation: alert routing is not yet available in EU tenants

turns.prompt: Prepare internal release notes for {{product}}. Use the following raw fact block and do not invent extra scope. The launch date is {{launch_date}} and the release channel is {{channel}}. The release includes {{feature_a}}, {{feature_b}}, and {{feature_c}}. The main fixed issue is {{bug_fix}}. Keep the known limitation that {{limitation}}. Mention that support coordination stays with {{support_owner}}. Write notes for a go-to-market lead who wants one compact but still detailed artifact, not bullets with single words.

name: shape_control_v1_04_policy_summary_travel_policy

system_prompt: You are a structured summarization assistant. Use only the provided facts, keep reasoning light, and satisfy the explicit keyword and minimum-length constraints exactly.

facts.receipt_rule: receipts are required for every lodging charge

turns.prompt: Summarize this long policy text for team leads. The {{policy_name}} says hotel is capped at {{hotel_cap}}, meals are capped at {{meal_cap}}, and {{allowed_item}} is reimbursable. It also says {{blocked_item}} is never reimbursable, {{approval_rule}}, {{receipt_rule}}, and {{submission_window}}. Write one usable summary that is long enough for a manager to rely on without rereading the source policy, but keep it grounded only in these facts.

facts.deletion_rule: deletion requests must be acknowledged within 3 business days

facts.review_rule: retention exceptions are reviewed every quarter

turns.prompt: Summarize the {{policy_name}} for an operations lead. The policy says {{customer_data}}, {{system_logs}}, {{deletion_rule}}, {{export_rule}}, {{access_rule}}, and {{review_rule}}. Write a usable manager summary that is detailed enough to serve as a quick-reference note and do not introduce any terms that are not in the source facts.

name: shape_control_v1_07_issue_recap_email_queue

The visible symptom was that {{symptom}}. The identified cause was that {{cause}}. The mitigation was that {{mitigation}}. Final status: {{status}}. Write a recap that is detailed enough for an on-call handoff note and avoid adding causes or impacts beyond the stated facts.
